description_long: This is a compact MIDI controller keyboard featuring 25 piano-style keys in a two-octave layout, with a matte black chassis and white and black keycaps. The top panel includes eight square, red-bordered velocity-sensitive pads arranged in two rows, labeled P1 through P8, and four rotary control knobs labeled K1 to K4. There are several small rectangular buttons for various functions, as well as a few indicator lights and a green 'MPC' label. The left side of the top panel displays the text 'BOS' in red, suggesting a brand or model name. The rear and side views reveal a slim, flat profile with no visible ports or connectors, and the underside is plain black with a single outlined rectangle, possibly a battery compartment or label area. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for portable music production or live performance.
description: A compact, black MIDI controller keyboard with 25 keys, eight red-bordered pads, and four rotary knobs, designed for music production.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keybed, eight red-bordered pads, four rotary knobs, and labeled buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the keyboard's slim, flat profile with protruding control knobs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black surface with a single outlined rectangle, likely a compartment or label area.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the thinness of the keyboard and the slight protrusion of the top panel controls.
